summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All listed PRs are open, hydrated with target_updated_at, and classified independently; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-routing mutation is planned.

actions.reason: Independent focused PR; keep open for normal maintainer review outside this inventory shard.
